transforms.name: cert-transparency
transforms.description: Discovers subdomains via Certificate Transparency logs (crt.sh)
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: domain-to-certs
transforms.description: Retrieves the SSL/TLS certificate for a domain and extracts certificate details
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: domain-to-crtsh-certificates
transforms.description: Queries crt.sh for certificate records associated with a domain
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: max_results
transform_settings.description: Maximum number of certificate records to emit

transform_settings.name: timeout_seconds
transform_settings.description: HTTP timeout for crt.sh queries

transforms.name: domain-to-ip
transforms.description: Resolves A and AAAA  records for a domain
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: domain-to-mx
transforms.description: Looks up MX (mail exchange) records for a domain
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: domain-to-ns
transforms.description: Looks up nameserver records for a domain
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: ip-to-domain
transforms.description: Performs reverse DNS lookup on an IP address
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: whois-lookup
transforms.description: Retrieves WHOIS registration data for a domain
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: domain-to-emails
transforms.description: Generates common email addresses for a domain after verifying MX records exist
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: email-to-domain
transforms.description: Extracts the domain from an email address
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: email-to-evidence
transforms.description: Collects evidence signals around an email address without claiming mailbox validity
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: timeout_seconds
transform_settings.description: DNS and HTTP timeout used for evidence collection

transform_settings.name: include_domain_entity
transform_settings.description: Emit the email domain as a Domain entity

transform_settings.name: include_source_urls
transform_settings.description: Emit observed source URLs already present in email properties

transform_settings.name: google_search_enabled
transform_settings.description: Perform a best-effort Google search for the exact email and crawl result pages for corroboration

transform_settings.name: google_max_results
transform_settings.description: Maximum Google result pages to crawl when search corroboration is enabled

transforms.name: person-to-emails
transforms.description: Generates likely email addresses for a person using known domains and clearly distinguishes observed versus inferred candidates
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: max_results
transform_settings.description: Maximum observed and inferred email candidates to return

transform_settings.name: include_observed_emails
transform_settings.description: Include emails already present in the person entity properties

transform_settings.name: include_inferred_emails
transform_settings.description: Infer likely email formats from the person's name and known domains

transform_settings.name: max_domains
transform_settings.description: Maximum number of candidate domains to use for inference

transforms.name: hash-lookup
transforms.description: Looks up a file hash on VirusTotal for threat intelligence
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: virustotal_api_key
transform_settings.description: API key for VirusTotal lookups

transforms.name: organization-to-team-members
transforms.description: Finds an organization's team pages and extracts up to 500 team members using OpenAI
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: openai_api_key
transform_settings.description: Required OpenAI API key used to extract team members

transform_settings.name: openai_model
transform_settings.description: Model used for extraction

transform_settings.name: max_members
transform_settings.description: Maximum number of team members to return (1-500)

transforms.name: ip-to-asn
transforms.description: Looks up ASN and organization for an IP address via DNS query to Team Cymru
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: ip-to-geolocation
transforms.description: Looks up geographic location for an IP address using ip-api.com
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: ip-to-greynoise-quick-context
transforms.description: Enriches an IP address with GreyNoise community quick context
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: timeout_seconds
transform_settings.description: HTTP timeout for the GreyNoise community lookup

transforms.name: profile-url-to-identifiers
transforms.description: Fetches a public profile page and extracts observed identifiers such as names, emails, links, usernames, and domains
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: timeout_seconds
transform_settings.description: Per-request timeout for fetching the profile page

transform_settings.name: max_results
transform_settings.description: Maximum extracted identifiers to return

transform_settings.name: max_content_chars
transform_settings.description: Maximum HTML/text characters to inspect during extraction

transform_settings.name: same_host_links_only
transform_settings.description: Restrict extracted links to the same host as the input profile URL

transforms.name: social-profile-to-entities
transforms.description: Fetches a public social profile URL from a SocialMedia entity and extracts observed identifiers
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: timeout_seconds
transform_settings.description: Per-request timeout for fetching the social profile page

transform_settings.name: max_results
transform_settings.description: Maximum extracted identifiers to return

transform_settings.name: max_content_chars
transform_settings.description: Maximum HTML/text characters to inspect during extraction

transform_settings.name: same_host_links_only
transform_settings.description: Restrict extracted links to the same host as the input profile URL

transforms.name: username-maigret
transforms.description: Finds claimed usernames using an OGI-native checker with a vendored Maigret site database
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: top_sites
transform_settings.description: Maximum number of ranked sites from the vendored Maigret database to query

transform_settings.name: include_disabled_sites
transform_settings.description: Include sites that the vendored Maigret database marks as disabled

transform_settings.name: timeout_seconds
transform_settings.description: Per-request timeout used by the adoption checker

transform_settings.name: max_results
transform_settings.description: Maximum number of claimed accounts to return

transform_settings.name: concurrency
transform_settings.description: Maximum concurrent site checks

transforms.name: username-search
transforms.description: Checks popular platforms for username existence
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: username-user-scanner
transforms.description: Finds username presence and email registration across many platforms using the user-scanner library
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: scan_scope
transform_settings.description: Category to scan. 'all' scans all available categories for the selected input type.

transform_settings.name: only_found
transform_settings.description: Only include found or registered results in output entities

transform_settings.name: max_results
transform_settings.description: Maximum number of found accounts to return

transforms.name: content-to-iocs
transforms.description: Extracts common indicators of compromise from Document content
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: document-to-phone-numbers
transforms.description: Extracts observed phone numbers from document content, normalizes them when possible, and preserves source context
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: default_region
transform_settings.description: Default region used when parsing numbers without an international prefix

transform_settings.name: max_results
transform_settings.description: Maximum number of phone numbers to return

transform_settings.name: context_window_chars
transform_settings.description: Character window captured around each phone number for analyst review

transforms.name: domain-to-urls
transforms.description: Fetches robots.txt and extracts URLs from Sitemap and Disallow directives
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: person-to-phone-numbers
transforms.description: Finds public phone numbers associated with a person from attached text, documents, and profile URLs with proximity-based scoring
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: default_region
transform_settings.description: Default region used when parsing numbers without an international prefix

transform_settings.name: max_results
transform_settings.description: Maximum number of phone numbers to return

transform_settings.name: max_sources
transform_settings.description: Maximum number of attached URLs or embedded documents to inspect

transform_settings.name: context_window_chars
transform_settings.description: Character window captured around each phone number for scoring and analyst review

transform_settings.name: name_proximity_chars
transform_settings.description: Maximum distance between the person's name and phone number before the match is considered weak

transform_settings.name: min_confidence
transform_settings.description: Minimum confidence required to emit a phone number

transform_settings.name: include_generic_contact_pages
transform_settings.description: Allow URLs with contact-like paths even when the person's name is not in the URL

transforms.name: url-to-content
transforms.description: Fetches a URL via Playwright and extracts readable text content into a Document entity
transforms.author: OGI Team

transform_settings.name: max_content_chars
transform_settings.description: Maximum number of extracted text characters to keep

transform_settings.name: allow_local_network
transform_settings.description: Allow localhost and private IP targets

transforms.name: url-to-headers
transforms.description: Performs a HEAD request and extracts interesting HTTP headers from a URL
transforms.author: OGI Team

transforms.name: url-to-links
transforms.description: Fetches a page and extracts outbound links and their domains
transforms.author: OGI Team
